zh: 到明年这个时候，我将已经毕业了。
en: By this time next year, I will have graduated.

zh: 到下周五，她将已经完成了这个项目。
en: By next Friday, she will have finished the project.

zh: 到今晚，他们将已经到达了目的地。
en: By tonight, they will have reached their destination.

zh: 到明天早上，我将已经读完这本书了。
en: By tomorrow morning, I will have finished reading this book.

zh: 到下个月，她将已经在这里工作了一年了。
en: By next month, she will have worked here for a year.

zh: 到2030年，科学家们将已经找到了治疗方法。
en: By 2030, scientists will have found a cure.

zh: 到他们到达时，我将已经做好了晚饭。
en: By the time they arrive, I will have cooked dinner.

zh: 到比赛结束时，他将已经跑了四十二公里了。
en: By the time the race ends, he will have run forty-two kilometers.

zh: 到她退休时，她将已经教了三十年书了。
en: By the time she retires, she will have taught for thirty years.

zh: 到你读到这封信时，我将已经离开了。
en: By the time you read this letter, I will have left.

zh: 到明年，他们将已经结婚十年了。
en: By next year, they will have been married for ten years.

zh: 到这个月底，我将已经存够了钱。
en: By the end of this month, I will have saved enough money.

zh: 到下周，工人们将已经修好了这条路。
en: By next week, the workers will have repaired the road.

zh: 到明天下午，她将已经完成了所有的准备工作。
en: By tomorrow afternoon, she will have completed all the preparations.

zh: 到这个学期结束时，我们将已经学了五百个单词了。
en: By the end of this term, we will have learned five hundred words.

zh: 到他们找到解决方案时，问题将已经变得更加严重了。
en: By the time they find a solution, the problem will have become more serious.

zh: 到明年夏天，这栋楼将已经建好了。
en: By next summer, this building will have been completed.

zh: 到她三十岁时，她将已经环游世界了。
en: By the time she is thirty, she will have traveled around the world.

zh: 到下个月底，他将已经读完了这套丛书。
en: By the end of next month, he will have read through the whole series.

zh: 到那时，技术将已经改变了我们的生活方式。
en: By then, technology will have changed our way of life.

zh: 到明天这个时候，飞机将已经降落了。
en: By this time tomorrow, the plane will have landed.

zh: 到会议结束时，他们将已经讨论了所有议题。
en: By the time the meeting ends, they will have discussed all the topics.

zh: 到她完成培训时，她将已经掌握了新技能。
en: By the time she completes the training, she will have mastered new skills.

zh: 到下个世纪，人类将已经登上了火星。
en: By the next century, humans will have landed on Mars.

zh: 到他们修好空调时，夏天将已经过去了。
en: By the time they fix the air conditioner, summer will have passed.

zh: 到明年，这家餐厅将已经开业二十年了。
en: By next year, this restaurant will have been open for twenty years.

zh: 到她回来时，我将已经整理好了房间。
en: By the time she comes back, I will have tidied up the room.

zh: 到这个项目完成时，团队将已经工作了两年了。
en: By the time this project is completed, the team will have worked for two years.

zh: 到他们宣布结果时，选手们将已经等了好几个小时了。
en: By the time they announce the results, the contestants will have waited for hours.

zh: 到下个月，她将已经在这个城市生活了整整十年了。
en: By next month, she will have lived in this city for exactly ten years.
